title: hiero-payment-requests PaymentRequest (JSON wire form), v1
description: The shape produced by encodeRequest / accepted by decodeRequest. The amount is an exact integer STRING in the asset's smallest unit — there are no decimals on the wire, ever. The schema is a contract: a breaking change bumps the version in the filename, $id, and the "v" field.

recipient.description: CAIP-10, e.g. hedera:mainnet:0.0.1234 (optionally with a verified HIP-15 checksum)

amount.description: Integer base units (tinybar / token smallest unit) as an exact decimal string

expiresAt.description: Consensus timestamp seconds.nanos — the chain's clock, not wall clock
